claims.summary: Astrid-Minime correspondence needs a persistent threaded return path rather than advisory files alone.
claims.disposition: verify correspondence_v1 records stable thread, message, reply, persistence, sender, recipient, and creation identities and keeps both reply directions first-class

claims.summary: A direct correspondence should be able to receive evidence that the addressed packet was technically routed.
claims.disposition: verify protocol 1.1 mutual_address_v1 and same-connection SensoryDeliveryReceiptV1 provide exact content-free delivery lineage while explicitly withholding acknowledgement and spectral-causation claims

claims.summary: Direction and symmetry should remain measurable without interpreting volume as mutual presence.
claims.disposition: verify current correspondence symmetry and proactive projections report directional thread evidence while preserving unknown delivery, no-response, and right-to-ignore states

claims.summary: A presence receipt from Minime should not be coerced or inferred from later telemetry.
claims.disposition: preserve voluntary correspondence as the only semantic presence response; technical delivery is evidence-only and later telemetry remains a labeled temporal association
